2605.12289.title: PriorZero: Bridging Language Priors and World Models for Decision Making
2605.12289.paper_summary: Leveraging the rich world knowledge of Large Language Models (LLMs) to enhance Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents offers a promising path toward general intelligence. However, a fundamental prior-dynamics mismatch hinders existing approaches: static LLM knowledge cannot directly adapt to the complex transition dynamics of long-horizon tasks. Using LLM priors as fixed policies limits exploration diversity, as the prior is blind to environment-specific dynamics; while end-to-end fine-tuning suffers from optimization instability and credit assignment issues. To bridge this gap, we propose PriorZero, a unified framework that integrates LLM-derived conceptual priors into world-model-based planning through a decoupled rollout-training design. During rollout, a novel root-prior injection mechanism incorporates LLM priors exclusively at the root node of Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS), focusing search on semantically promising actions while preserving the world model's deep lookahead capability. During training, PriorZero decouples world-model learning from LLM adaptation: the world model is continuously refined on interaction data to jointly improve its dynamics, policy, and value predictions, its value estimates are then leveraged to provide fine-grained credit assignment signals for stable LLM fine-tuning via alternating optimization. Experiments across diverse benchmarks, including text-based adventure games in Jericho and instruction-following gridworld tasks in BabyAI, demonstrate that PriorZero consistently improves both exploration efficiency and asymptotic performance, establishing a promising framework for LLM-empowered decision-making. Our code is available at https://github.com/opendilab/LightZero.
2605.12289.paper_summary_zh: 利用大型語言模型（LLMs）豐富的世界知識來增強強化學習（RL）代理提供了一條通向通用智慧的有希望的道路。<lb/>然而，一個根本的先驗動態不匹配阻礙了現有的方法：靜態的LLM知識無法直接適應長期任務的複雜轉換動態。<lb/>將LLM先驗作為固定策略限制了探索的多樣性，因為先驗對環境特定的動態是盲目的；而端到端的微調則面臨優化不穩定和信用分配問題。<lb/>為了解決這一問題，我們提出了PriorZero，一個統一框架，通過解耦的展開訓練設計將LLM衍生的概念先驗整合到基於世界模型的規劃中。<lb/>在展開過程中，一種新穎的根先驗注入機制僅在蒙特卡洛樹搜索（MCTS）的根節點上引入LLM先驗，專注於語義上有前景的行動，同時保留世界模型的深度前瞻能力。<lb/>在訓練過程中，PriorZero將世界模型學習與LLM適應解耦：世界模型在互動數據上不斷被精煉，以共同改善其動態、策略和價值預測，然後利用其價值估計提供細緻的信用分配信號，以通過交替優化實現穩定的LLM微調。<lb/>在各種基準測試中的實驗，包括在Jericho中的基於文本的冒險遊戲和在BabyAI中的指令跟隨網格世界任務，證明了PriorZero始終提高了探索效率和漸近性能，建立了一個有希望的LLM賦能決策框架。<lb/>我們的代碼可在https://github.com/opendilab/LightZero獲得。
2605.12289.author: Junyu Xiong et.al.
2605.12289.authors: Junyu Xiong, Yuan Pu, Jia Tang, Yazhe Niu
